characters.description: An eighteen-year-old sheep-farm worker who expects to become a baker and marry Nancy. His selection instead produces two skills and a black result, after which Guild representatives falsely declare him unskilled and take him into custody.
characters.name: Max

characters.description: Max's intended wife and a trained baker. Their families have approved the match on the condition that Max completes a baking apprenticeship after his selection.
characters.name: Nancy

characters.description: Max's closest friend, present for the selection ceremony and hoping to follow a warrior's path.
characters.name: Caleb

characters.description: Max's sister, a town-guard trainee who plans to seek an adventuring career after her own selection the following year.
characters.name: Stacy

characters.description: A Guild operative whose truth-detection ability indicates that Max's family is not concealing him after his escape.
characters.name: Trina

characters.description: The local authority directing the search for Max. He knows the selection produced Baker and an unidentified black skill, and he prepares to widen the hunt beyond the town.
characters.name: Senior Guild advisor

characters.description: A sheepdog that joins Max against three goblins and prevents one from finishing him, suffering a grave wound during the fight.
characters.name: Sheepdog

characters.description: A young blacksmith who exchanges a well-balanced spear for Max's salvaged goblin weapons and asks him to bring back more usable metal from future fights.
characters.name: Young blacksmith

characters.description: The registered adventurer identity adopted by Max after he changes his appearance. Under this name he presents himself as an F-rank spear fighter, giving the fugitive a documented cover for Guild work.
characters.name: Seth Pendell

characters.description: A sword-and-shield adventurer who offers Seth a place in a future dungeon group and directs him to find her at an east-side inn.
characters.name: Elf party leader

characters.description: A dwarf Guild attendant who processes Seth's monster trophies and notices that his colored stones may qualify for another assignment.
characters.name: Greta

characters.description: An unidentified power who orders two rulers to find a boy with a black skill. The being kills their throne-room guards and threatens the rulers with punishment if the search fails.
characters.name: Powerful being

characters.description: A warrior who initially challenges Seth's claim to kobold kills. He then accepts Seth's compromise and joins the newly formed group preparing to enter the kobold dungeon.
characters.name: Brutus

characters.description: A ranged fighter who joins Brutus, an unnamed healer, and Seth in a newly formed group preparing to enter the kobold dungeon.
characters.name: Archer

characters.description: The level-three healer in Seth's first formal dungeon party. He can bless the whole group and restore injuries while the others hold the fighting line.
characters.name: Miles

characters.description: A local adviser who cautions Seth against bringing companions into battles they are not ready to survive.
characters.name: Innkeeper

characters.description: An unidentified woman who knows Max's name and tells him that he is marked. She warns that several powers want to kill or exploit him and urges him to become stronger.
characters.name: Temple woman

characters.description: A gear specialist who examines Seth's bonded spear and identifies its attribute bonuses and extra effectiveness against stronger enemies.
characters.name: Magic-shop owner

characters.description: The healer in the elf-led party during Seth's goblin-dungeon expedition.
characters.name: Lucia

characters.description: An elf rogue who isolates Max in the goblin boss room, admits that the party has killed humans, and tries to murder him.
characters.name: Elf rogue

characters.description: The person responsible for a merchant caravan's workers and route.
characters.name: Caravan leader

characters.description: A caravan guard and former adventurer who has become fearful and discouraged.
characters.name: Former adventurer

characters.description: The owner of the bakery across from Max's inn. He invites Max to work in the shop and joins Amy in evaluating three cupcake variations made with Max's Baking skill.
characters.name: Bakery owner

characters.description: The bakery owner's daughter and a working baker. She shares Seth's enthusiasm for the craft and helps evaluate the cupcake variations he prepares in her family's bakery.
characters.name: Amy

characters.description: The front-line fighter in an established three-person group that recruits Seth for a level-fifteen lizardman dungeon.
characters.name: Dwarf warrior

characters.description: The spellcaster in Seth's new lizardman-dungeon party. Her root magic holds enemies in place so the group's melee fighters can control the first engagement.
characters.name: Elf mage

characters.description: The healer in Seth's new party, equipped with several restorative spells and a powerful emergency heal that can be used once per day.
characters.name: Dwarf healer

characters.description: A highly regarded warrior below level twenty-five who leads the defensive line when the Shade approaches the city.
characters.name: Hannah

characters.description: A Guild-affiliated tracker who follows Caleb in hopes of connecting Seth Pendell to Max. Max captures him after using stealth and a campfire decoy to reverse the ambush.
characters.name: James

characters.description: One of two sisters directing another search for Max. She helps decide that the uncertainty surrounding his reported death must be resolved.
characters.name: Molly

characters.description: One of two sisters directing another search for Max. She participates in the decision to hire a tracker and use his personal connections as leads.
characters.name: Macy

characters.description: The regional leader of a hostile order, receiving a survivor's report that an operation failed and Seth Pendell may have died during a boss encounter.
characters.name: Regional order head

characters.description: A warrior who leads a four-person adventuring party above level twenty-five. He allows Seth to take selected finishing blows during a higher-level dungeon run and teaches him how to harvest useful monster parts.
characters.name: Aldrich

characters.description: A shield-bearing woman in Aldrich's higher-level party who joins Seth on a dangerous dungeon expedition.
characters.name: Aldrich's warrior

characters.description: An unidentified woman who says she spent stored power on Max and that his black skill has surpassed her expectations. She is pursuing a concealed plan with another woman.
characters.name: Secret sponsor

characters.description: A red-haired, cloaked collaborator who has carried out the secret sponsor's request. She intends to keep their plan hidden and is alarmed by the return of a black skill after centuries.
characters.name: Cloaked associate
